lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਏਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak vaahu vaahu guramukh paaeeai anadin naam lee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, Waaho! Waaho! This is obtained by the Gurmukhs, who hold tight to the Naam, night and day. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਸਾਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਦੂਜੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve saat na aavee doojee naahee jaae |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, peace is not obtained, and the sense of duality does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਬਹੁਤੇਰਾ ਲੋਚੀਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: je bahuteraa locheeai vin karamai na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: No matter how much one may wish, without the Lord's Grace, He is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa antar lobh vikaar hai doojai bhaae khuaae |
lines.english: Those who are filled with greed and corruption are ruined by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran na chukee haumai vich dukh paae |
lines.english: They cannot escape birth and death, and with egotism within them, they suffer in misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਤਲਬ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਨਾ ਓਇ ਦੁਖ ਸਹਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin jam kee talab na hovee naa oe dukh sahaeh |
lines.english: They are not summoned by the Messenger of Death, and they do not suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਸੁ ਖਾਲੀ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa satigur siau chit laaeaa su khaalee koee naeh |
lines.english: Those who center their consciousness on the True Guru, never go empty-handed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh ubare sachai sabad samaeh |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are saved; they merge in the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਢੀ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿ ਖਸਮੈ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dtaadtee tis no aakheeai ji khasamai dhare piaar |
lines.english: He alone is called a minstrel, who enshrines love for his Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਢੀ ਦਰੁ ਘਰੁ ਪਾਇਸੀ ਸਚੁ ਰਖੈ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dtaadtee dar ghar paaeisee sach rakhai ur dhaar |
lines.english: The minstrel attains the Lord's Gate and Mansion, and he keeps the True Lord clasped to his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਖੜਾ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dar kharraa sevaa kare gurasabadee veechaar |
lines.english: Standing at the Lord's Door, he serves the Lord, and reflects upon the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਢੀ ਕਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਅਗਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਇ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dtaadtee kaa mehal agalaa har kai naae piaar |
lines.english: The status of the minstrel is exalted; he loves the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਢੀ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਿ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: dtaadtee kee sevaa chaakaree har jap har nisataar |18|
lines.english: The service of the minstrel is to meditate on the Lord; he is emancipated by the Lord. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਜਾਤਿ ਗਵਾਰਿ ਜਾ ਸਹੁ ਪਾਏ ਆਪਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree jaat gavaar jaa sahu paae aapanaa |
lines.english: The milkmaid's status is very low, but she attains her Husband Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad veechaar anadin har jap jaapanaa |
lines.english: when she reflects upon the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and chants the Lord's Name, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਕੰਤ ਕਾ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕੀਤੀ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saa hukam pachhaanai kant kaa jis no kripaa keetee karataar |
lines.english: She alone realizes the Hukam of her Husband Lord's Command, who is blessed by the Creator Lord's Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਉ ਪਵੈ ਸਾ ਕੁਲਵੰਤੀ ਨਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis satigur milai tis bhau pavai saa kulavantee naar |
lines.english: She who meets the True Guru, lives in the Fear of God; she is a woman of noble birth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਕੁਚਜੀ ਕੁਲਖਣੀ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਛੋਡੀ ਭਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: oeh kuchajee kulakhanee parahar chhoddee bhataar |
lines.english: She who is of little merit and ill-mannered, is discarded and forsaken by her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਪਇਐ ਮਲੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਰੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhai peiai mal katteeai niramal hovai sareer |
lines.english: By the Fear of God, filth is washed off, and the body becomes immaculately pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: antar paragaas mat aootam hovai har jap gunee gaheer |
lines.english: The soul is enlightened, and the intellect is exalted, meditating on the Lord, the ocean of excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਬੈਸੈ ਭੈ ਰਹੈ ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bhai vich baisai bhai rahai bhai vich kamaavai kaar |
lines.english: One who dwells in the Fear of God, lives in the Fear of God, and acts in the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਿਲਿ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bhai te nirbhau paaeeai mil jotee jot apaar |
lines.english: Through the Fear of God, the Fearless Lord is obtained, and one's light merges in the Infinite Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਦਰਗਹ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: aithai sukh vaddiaaeea daragah mokh duaar |
lines.english: He obtains peace and glorious greatness here, in the Lord's Court, and at the Gate of Salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਖਸਮੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਾ ਭਲੀ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak khasamai bhaavai saa bhalee jis no aape bakhase karataar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, that bride alone is good, who is pleasing to her Lord and Master, and whom the Creator Lord Himself forgives. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਚੇ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa saalaaheeai sache kau bal jaau |
lines.english: Praise the Lord, forever and ever, and make yourself a sacrifice to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਸਾ ਅਉਤਾਰੁ ਉਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਭਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: ansaa aautaar upaaeon bhaau doojaa keea |
lines.english: From a single particle of His greatness, He created His incarnations, but they indulged in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗੈ ਸਾ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak ek chhodd doojai lagai saa jihavaa jal jaau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, let that tongue be burnt, which renounces the One Lord, and attaches itself to another. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਸਰੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਅੰਤੁ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਨ ਲਹੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: eesar brahamaa sevade ant tinaee na laheea |
lines.english: Those who serve Shiva and Brahma do not find the limits of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਰਾਜੇ ਰਾਜੁ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਭਿੜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jiau raaje raaj kamaavade dukh sukh bhirreea |
lines.english: They ruled like kings, and fought for pleasure and pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਅਲਖੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau nirankaar alakh hai guramukh pragatteea |
lines.english: The Fearless, Formless Lord is unseen and invisible; He is revealed only to the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਸੋਗੁ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪਈ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਜਗਿ ਥੀਆ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: tithai sog vijog na viaapee asathir jag theea |19|
lines.english: There, one does not suffer sorrow or separation; he becomes stable and immortal in the world. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਏਹੁ ਲੇਖਾ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਹੋਆ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin ehu lekhaa likhiaa so hoaa paravaan |
lines.english: One who knows this written account is acceptable and approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਜੇਤਾ ਹੈ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ehu sabh kichh aavan jaan hai jetaa hai aakaar |
lines.english: All these things come and go, all these things of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਕੁੰਚਰੁ ਪੀਲਕੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਜਹ ਖਿੰਚੇ ਤਹ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man kunchar peelak guroo giaan kunddaa jeh khinche teh jaae |
lines.english: The mind is the elephant, the Guru is the elephant-driver, and knowledge is the whip. Wherever the Guru drives the mind, it goes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਆਪੁ ਗਣਾਇਦਾ ਸੋ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਗਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak je ko aap ganaaeidaa so moorakh gaavaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, anyone who takes pride in himself is foolish and unwise. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਸਤੀ ਕੁੰਡੇ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਉਝੜਿ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak hasatee kundde baaharaa fir fir ujharr paae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the whip, the elephant wanders into the wilderness, again and again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis aagai aradaas jin upaaeaa |
lines.english: I offer my prayer to the One, from whom I was created.
